description_long: A classic cheeseburger sits on a round, blue-and-white checkered plate, accompanied by a generous serving of golden French fries and a small metal cup of dipping sauce. The hamburger features a plain white bun, with the top bun slightly askew, revealing a thick beef patty topped with melted cheddar cheese. Crisp green lettuce and bright red tomato slices are layered beneath the patty, adding color and freshness. The fries are scattered on one side of the plate, while the sauce cup is positioned near the burger. The plate itself has a retro diner aesthetic, with printed text around the rim. The overall presentation is appetizing and visually balanced, evoking a classic American diner meal.
description: A cheeseburger with lettuce, tomato, and melted cheese on a plain bun, served with fries and a sauce cup on a blue-and-white checkered plate.
description_view_0: The cheeseburger is seen from the side, with the top bun tilted, revealing the cheese, patty, lettuce, and tomato; fries and sauce cup are visible on the left.
description_view_1: A frontal view shows the full stack of the burger with all toppings clearly visible, fries and sauce cup are in the foreground.
description_view_2: The burger is viewed from the opposite side, with the top bun more prominent and the patty, cheese, and toppings peeking out; fries are less visible.
description_view_3: The back of the burger is shown, mostly the plain top bun and fries, with minimal visibility of the patty or toppings.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce and tomato slices are layered beneath the beef patty, which is topped with a melted slice of cheddar cheese; the top bun is slightly offset, exposing the toppings.
